  • Exports

  • XML generation

Imports

base_errors, oswrap, rx, helpers, colorstring, clformat

Types

HXmlParserEventError = object of CatchableError
HXmlParser = object
  base*: XmlParser
  traceNext*: bool
  file*: AbsFile

HXmlParseError = object of CatchableError
XsdTokenKind = enum
  xtkString,                ## ``xsd:string``
  xtkBoolean,               ## ``xsd:boolean``
  xtkDecimal,               ## ``xsd:decimal``
  xtkInteger,               ## ``xsd:integer``
  xtkFloat,                 ## ``xsd:float``
  xtkDouble,                ## ``xsd:double``
  xtkDuration,              ## ``xsd:duration``
  xtkDateTime,              ## ``xsd:datetime``
  xtkTime,                  ## ``xsd:time``
  xtkDate,                  ## ``xsd:date``
  xtkGYearMonth,            ## ``xsd:gyearmonth``
  xtkGYear,                 ## ``xsd:gyear``
  xtkGMonthDay,             ## ``xsd:gmonthday``
  xtkGDay,                  ## ``xsd:gday``
  xtkGMonth,                ## ``xsd:gmonth``
  xtkHexBinary,             ## ``xsd:hexbinary``
  xtkBase64Binary,          ## ``xsd:base64binary``
  xtkUri,                   ## ``xsd:uri``
  xtkAnyType,               ## ``xsd:anytype``
  xtkError,                 ## an error occurred during parsing
  xtkEof,                   ## end of file reached
  xtkCharData,              ## character data
  xtkWhitespace,            ## whitespace has been parsed
  xtkComment,               ## a comment has been parsed
  xtkPI,                    ## processing instruction (``<?name something ?>``)
  xtkElementStart,          ## ``<elem>``
  xtkElementEnd,            ## ``</elem>``
  xtkElementOpen,           ## ``<elem
  xtkAttribute,             ## ``key = "value"`` pair
  xtkElementClose,          ## ``>``
  xtkCData,                 ## ``<![CDATA[`` ... data ... ``]]>``
  xtkEntity,                ## &entity;
  xtkSpecial                 ## ``<! ... data ... >``
XsdToken = object
  case kind*: XsdTokenKind
  of xtkNamedKinds:
      xmlName*: string

  else:
      nil

  
XmlWriter = object
  stream: Stream
  indentBuf: string
  ignoreIndent: int

Consts

xmlAttr = xmlAttribute
xtkNamedKinds = {xtkElementStart..xtkAttribute}

Procs

proc parseXml(file: AbsFile): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ValueError,
    Exception, XmlError], tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect].}
proc currentEventToStr(parser: HXmlParser): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [].}
proc displayAt(parser: HXmlParser): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc `$`(p: HXmlParser): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}

    ValueError], tags: [].}

    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError], tags: [].}

    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError], tags: [].}

                                       tags: [].}
proc attrValue(my: HXmlParser): string {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError], tags: [].}

                                      tags: [].}
proc piRest(my: HXmlParser): string {...}{.raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError],
                                      tags: [].}
proc kind(parser: HXmlParser): XmlEventKind {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc strVal(parser: HXmlParser): string {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError], tags: [].}
proc next(parser: var HXmlParser) {...}{.raises: [ValueError, IOError, OSError],
                                    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc errorAt(parser: var HXmlParser): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc skipElementStart(parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string) {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipElementEnd(parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string) {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc `[]`(r: var HXmlParser; key: string): bool {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError], tags: [].}
proc atClose(r: var HXmlParser): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc atEnd(r: var HXmlParser): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc atOpenStart(r: var HXmlParser): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc atAttr(r: var HXmlParser): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc atCdata(r: var HXmlParser): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc skipOpen(r: var HXmlParser; tag: string) {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipStart(r: var HXmlParser; tag: string) {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipClose(r: var HXmlParser) {...}{.raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError,
    IOError, OSError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipCloseEnd(r: var HXmlParser) {...}{.raises: [HXmlParserEventError,
    ValueError, IOError, OSError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc skipEnd(r: var HXmlParser; tag: string) {...}{.raises: [HXmlParserEventError,
    ValueError, HXmlParseError, IOError, OSError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc newHXmlParser(file: AbsFile; traceNext: bool = false): HXmlParser {...}{.
    raises: [PathError, OSError, ValueError, IOError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect].}
proc newHXmlParser(text: string; traceNext: bool = false): HXmlParser {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc close(parser: var HXmlParser) {...}{.raises: [Exception, IOError, OSError],
                                     tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc `=destroy`(parser: var HXmlParser) {...}{.raises: [Exception, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc find(node: XmlNode; subnodeTag: string): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc treeRepr(pnode: XmlNode; colored: bool = true; indexed: bool = false;
              maxdepth: int = 120): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc parseXsdString(target: var XsdParseTarget[string]; parser: var HXmlParser;
                    tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdBoolean(target: var XsdParseTarget[bool]; parser: var HXmlParser;
                     tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdDecimal(target: var XsdParseTarget[float]; parser: var HXmlParser;
                     tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdInteger(target: var XsdParseTarget[int]; parser: var HXmlParser;
                     tag: string = "")

                   tag: string = "")

                    tag: string = "")

                      parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string = "")

                      parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string = "")

                  tag: string = "")

                  tag: string = "")

                        parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdGYear(target: var XsdParseTarget[DateTime]; parser: var HXmlParser;
                   tag: string = "")
proc paresXsdGMonthDay(target: var XsdParseTarget[DateTime];
                       parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdGDay(target: var XsdParseTarget[DateTime]; parser: var HXmlParser;
                  tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdGMonth(target: var XsdParseTarget[DateTime];
                    parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdHexBinary(target: var XsdParseTarget[string];
                       parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdBase64Binary(target: var XsdParseTarget[string];
                          parser: var HXmlParser; tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdUri(target: var XsdParseTarget[Uri]; parser: var HXmlParser;
                 tag: string = "")
proc parseXsdAnyType(target: var XmlNode; parser: var HXmlParser;
                     tag: string = "") {...}{.raises: [HXmlParserEventError,
    ValueError, IOError, OSError, HXmlParseError, ImplementKindError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc classifyXsdString(str: string; expected: set[XsdTokenKind]): XsdTokenKind {...}{.
    raises: [RegexError, ArgumentError], tags: [].}
proc xsdToken(parser: HXmlParser; expected: set[XsdTokenKind]): XsdToken {...}{.
    raises: [RegexError, ArgumentError, HXmlParserEventError, ValueError],
    tags: [].}
Classify current XSD token

                                    tags: [WriteIOEffect].}

proc newXmlWriter(file: AbsFile): XmlWriter {...}{.
    raises: [PathError, OSError, ValueError], tags: [ReadDirEffect].}

    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}

    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}

    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc xmlClose(writer) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}

    tags: [WriteIOEffect].}

    tags: [WriteIOEffect].}

                                      tags: [WriteIOEffect].}

                  value: SomeInteger | bool | float | enum | string)

              tag: string)

proc writeXml[T](writer; opt: Option[T]; tag: string)
proc writeXml(writer; value: Slice[int]; tag: string) {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc writeXml[E: enum](writer; values: set[E]; tag: string)

    raises: [ValueError, HXmlParserEventError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}

proc loadXml[T](stream: var HXmlParser; target: var Option[T]; tag: string)

    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}

    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc loadXml(stream: var HXmlParser; target: var int; tag: string) {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError, HXmlParserEventError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc loadXml(reader; target: var Slice[int]; tag: string) {...}{.
    raises: [HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc loadXml(reader; target: var XmlNode; tag: string) {...}{.raises: [
    HXmlParserEventError, ValueError, IOError, OSError, HXmlParseError,
    ImplementKindError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}

Funcs

func add(xml: var XmlNode; optXml: Option[XmlNode]) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func newXml(tag: string; args: seq[XmlNode] = @[]): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
func wrap(xml: XmlNode; tag: string): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func wrap(xml: seq[XmlNode]; tag: string): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func add(xml: var XmlNode; sub: seq[XmlNode]): void {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `[]=`(xml: var XmlNode; attrname: string; attrval: string): void {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func safeTag(node: XmlNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func hasAttr(node: XmlNode; attribute: string): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `[]`(node: XmlNode; property: string): string {...}{.raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [].}
func optGet(node: XmlNode; property: string): Option[string] {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError], tags: [].}
func name(token: XsdToken): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `$`(token: XsdToken): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

Iterators

iterator pairs(node: XmlNode): (int, XmlNode) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

Templates

template expectAt(parser: HXmlParser; at: set[XmlEventKind]; procname: string): untyped {...}{.
    dirty.}
template raiseUnexpectedAttribute(parser: HXmlParser): untyped
template raiseUnknownElement(parser: HXmlParser; extra: string = ""): untyped
template raiseUnexpectedElement(parser: HXmlParser; tag: string;
                                extra: string = ""): untyped
template raiseUnexpectedToken(parser: HXmlParser; token: XsdToken): untyped
template loadPrimitive(stream: var HXmlParser; target: typed; tag: string;
                       loadAttr: untyped; loadField: untyped): untyped
template loadXml[T](stream: var HXmlParser; target: var seq[T]; tag: string;
                    mixedStr: T; fieldAsgn: untyped)

Exports

raiseArgumentError, newArgumentError, raiseLogicError, canImport, InstantiationInfo, newImplementKindError, newImplementError, prepareMsg, kindToStr, raiseImplementKindError, newUnexpectedKindError, UnexpectedKindError, assertKind, LogicError, ParseError, raiseImplementError, ErrorAnnotation, GlobalSubstring, raiseUnexpectedKindError, ImplementError, ArgumentError, CodeError, ImplementKindError, withNewDir, rmFile, splitFile, normalizedPath, symlinkExists, splitFile, OutStringStream, isAbsolute, currentSourceDir, withNewStreamFile, ==, contains, getEnv, findExe, joinPath, hash,
